# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)
> **日期**: 2026-07-01 | **更新时间**: 07:41 (北京时间)
> **监控范围**: Global (In vivo/FDA) & China (NMPA/Biotech)

---

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[07:13]` **🏛️监管 | Orca Bio 的 TREGZI 获得美国 FDA 批准，成为首个也是唯一一个用于成人血液恶性肿瘤同种异体移植的精密工程细胞疗法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Orca Bio’s TREGZI Receives U.S. FDA Approval as First and Only Precision-Engineered Cell Therapy for Allogeneic Transplant in Adults with Hematological Malignancies* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **🏛️监管 | Cellares 被 FDA 首届制造预检查队列接受，是全国七家公司中唯一的细胞治疗平台**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Cellares Accepted to FDA's Inaugural Manufacturing PreCheck Cohort, the Only Cell Therapy Platform Among Seven Companies Nationwide* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[21:00]` **一家临床阶段的癌症公司正在利用人工智能设计下一代肿瘤靶向药物**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *A Clinical-Stage Cancer Company Is Putting AI to Work Designing Its Next Generation of Tumor-Targeting Drugs* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

---

## 🇨🇳 中国动态 (NMPA / Domestic Players)
- `[03:00]` **随着生物制药竞赛的加剧，中国重写临床试验规则**
